# FreeAppKit - Free 2026 Online Tools, Templates, and Guides

> FreeAppKit is a free collection of online tools and template-based web apps for productivity, health, finance, design, and utility workflows.

## About
FreeAppKit publishes no-signup tools, practical guides, and template pages with legal/privacy transparency, consent controls, and SEO-friendly static route output.

## Main Pages
- [Home](https://freeappkit.com/): Overview of all free tools and templates.
- [Guides](https://freeappkit.com/guides): Collection of practical how-to guides.
- [About](https://freeappkit.com/about): Project mission and background.
- [FAQ](https://freeappkit.com/faq): Frequently asked questions and support info.
- [How It Works](https://freeappkit.com/how-it-works): Step-by-step usage workflow.
- [Affiliate Disclosure](https://freeappkit.com/affiliate-disclosure): Transparency about partner links.
- [Impressum](https://freeappkit.com/impressum): Legal notice and operator details.
- [Privacy Policy](https://freeappkit.com/privacy): Privacy and data processing details.
- [Terms](https://freeappkit.com/terms): Legal document index page.
- [Cookie Policy](https://freeappkit.com/cookie-policy): Cookie categories and consent model.
- [Cookie Preferences](https://freeappkit.com/cookie-preferences): Direct entry point to consent settings.

## Tool Categories

### Finance (4)
- [Salary Calculator](https://freeappkit.com/templates/salary-calculator): Calculate your net salary with visual tax breakdowns for Germany and USA.
- [Tip Calculator](https://freeappkit.com/templates/tip-calculator): Calculate tips and split bills easily.
- [Compound Interest Calculator](https://freeappkit.com/templates/compound-interest-calculator): Visualize your investment growth with animated charts.
- [Mortgage Calculator](https://freeappkit.com/templates/mortgage-calculator): Calculate loan payments with visual amortization charts.

### Health & Wellness (7)
- [Carbon Footprint Calculator](https://freeappkit.com/templates/carbon-footprint-calculator): Calculate your CO2 footprint and see how many Earths your lifestyle needs.
- [Breathing Circle](https://freeappkit.com/templates/breathing-circle): Calming breathing exercise with smooth pulsing animations.
- [Emoji Mood Tracker](https://freeappkit.com/templates/emoji-mood-tracker): Track your daily mood with emojis and calendar visualization.
- [Water Intake Tracker](https://freeappkit.com/templates/water-intake-tracker): Stay hydrated with beautiful water tracking animations.
- [Sleep Calculator](https://freeappkit.com/templates/sleep-calculator): Calculate optimal bedtimes based on sleep cycles.
- [Ambient Sound Mixer](https://freeappkit.com/templates/ambient-sound-mixer): Mix relaxing sounds for focus, sleep, and meditation.
- [BMI Calculator](https://freeappkit.com/templates/bmi-calculator): Calculate your BMI with visual health indicators.

### Fun & Games (5)
- [Music Taste Visualizer](https://freeappkit.com/templates/music-taste-visualizer): Select your favorite genres and generate a beautiful Music DNA card to share.
- [Decision Spinner](https://freeappkit.com/templates/decision-spinner): Can't decide? Spin the wheel! Customizable options.
- [3D Dice Roller](https://freeappkit.com/templates/3d-dice-roller): Roll dice with realistic 3D animations. Perfect for games!
- [Live Age Calculator](https://freeappkit.com/templates/live-age-calculator): See your exact age in years, days, hours, and live-ticking seconds!
- [Reaction Time Test](https://freeappkit.com/templates/reaction-time-test): Test and improve your reaction time with a simple click game.

### Productivity (3)
- [Gradient Pomodoro Timer](https://freeappkit.com/templates/gradient-pomodoro-timer): Beautiful focus timer with animated gradients and session tracking.
- [Year Progress Bar](https://freeappkit.com/templates/year-progress-bar): Visualize how much of the year has passed. Perfect for sharing!
- [Habit Streak Tracker](https://freeappkit.com/templates/habit-streak-tracker): Track habits with a GitHub-style contribution graph.

### Tools & Utilities (3)
- [Daily Inspiration](https://freeappkit.com/templates/daily-inspiration): Beautiful quotes with stunning gradient backgrounds.
- [Event Countdown Timer](https://freeappkit.com/templates/event-countdown-timer): Create shareable countdowns for birthdays and special events.
- [Password Generator](https://freeappkit.com/templates/password-generator): Generate secure passwords instantly. Customize length and characters.

### Design & Dev (2)
- [Color Palette Generator](https://freeappkit.com/templates/color-palette-generator): Generate beautiful color palettes. Click to copy hex codes.
- [CSS Gradient Generator](https://freeappkit.com/templates/css-gradient-generator): Create stunning CSS gradients with an intuitive visual editor.

## Guides (5)
- [Pomodoro Technique Guide](https://freeappkit.com/guides/pomodoro-technique-guide): Learn the Pomodoro Timer method in 2026 with practical session planning, focus cycles, break timing, and related free productivity tools.
- [BMI Calculator Guide](https://freeappkit.com/guides/bmi-calculator-guide): Use a free 2026 BMI Calculator correctly, understand BMI categories, avoid common mistakes, and connect results to sustainable health habits.
- [Password Generator Guide](https://freeappkit.com/guides/password-generator-guide): Create stronger credentials with a free 2026 Password Generator, length strategy, passphrase tips, and practical account security workflows.
- [Compound Interest Guide](https://freeappkit.com/guides/compound-interest-guide): Plan smarter savings with a free 2026 Compound Interest Calculator, contribution scenarios, growth assumptions, and long-term forecasting tips.
- [Carbon Footprint Guide](https://freeappkit.com/guides/carbon-footprint-guide): Use a free 2026 Carbon Footprint Calculator to estimate impact, prioritize reduction actions, and track practical sustainability improvements over time.
